title: Fresh Low Carb Brazilian Corn Crumble
description: A breezy, keto-friendly twist on a classic Brazilian corn casserole, using fresh low‑carb ingredients and a creamy, caramelized topping.
instructions: In a small pot, gently heat coconut milk until warm, then remove from heat.
In a bowl, beat the egg and add erythritol, salt, lemon zest, and mint leaves.
Stir in the softened cream cheese until fully blended.
Add the warm coconut milk to the mixture and whisk until smooth.
Fold in fresh corn kernels, reserving a small handful for topping.
Transfer the mixture to a lightly greased 8-inch square baking dish and spread evenly.
Sprinkle the reserved corn and chopped almonds on top.
Dot the surface with small pieces of butter.
Bake for 20–22 minutes, or until the top is golden and the filling is set.
Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
